name: video-highlights-processor
description: Processes videos to identify engaging moments, generate transcripts, and create highlight clips with artistic titles and custom cover images. Use when user needs to: extract highlights from long videos or livestreams, clip or cut best moments from videos, process Bilibili/YouTube URLs or local video files, generate transcripts via Whisper, analyze content for engaging moments, create short-form clips with styled titles and covers, adjust cover text position and colors, or find and export memo...
